title: Exotic Tender Algerian Chicken Tagine
description: A salty and tender Algerian dish featuring chicken, pretzels, and spices, cooked in a tandoor clay pot, perfect for a sick day, this ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly recipe is sure to comfort and nourish, the combination of chicken and pretzels provides a unique flavor and texture.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor clay pot to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, ginger, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken thighs to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Add the crushed pretzels to the bowl and toss to combine with the chicken and marinade.
Add the chopped onion to the tandoor clay pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chicken and pretzel mixture to the tandoor clay pot and cook, covered, for 30 minutes.
Remove the lid and cook for an additional 10 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the pretzels are crispy.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs, if desired.
